Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 i 

Revision Log 

Date Changed by Revisions Version 
October 2025 K. Schneider • Updated Plan Premium file to indicate the following six fields 
are retired after 2023: PART_D_LIS_25, PART_D_LIS_50, 
PART_D_LIS_75, PART_D_LIPS_25, PART_D_LIPS_50, and 
PART_D_LIPS_75 
• Added POST_OOPT_EXCL_DRUG_CST_SHR and 15 new 
Insulin variables to Plan Tier file for 2024:
